SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-08-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-08-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK:S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (505)

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$30.00) SERVED FEB-04-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LAU, CORY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KALEY, STEPHANIE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LAU, CORY $1,572.98 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,652.98, THE JUDGMENT REPRESENTS RETURN OF PLAINTIFF'S SECURITY DEPOSIT, PLUS INTEREST; AND REDUCED BY $240.00 FOR PAINTING. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
